overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The vehicle navigates a multi-lane highway lined with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon billboards, eventually slowing to a stop at the Hudson intersection to reveal a dense, illuminated urban landscape with heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked multi-lane highway with towering neon billboards

agents.ego_description: driving at steady speed through moderate traffic on the wet highway, navigating between futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying a cyan-colored cyberpunk face advertisement
reflective metal barrier separating the highway lanes
row of trees with sparse foliage lining the left side of the highway
tall modern street lamps casting white light onto the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady drive along a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night. The wet asphalt reflects the glow of massive neon billboards and streetlights while futuristic vehicles navigate the road. A large digital billboard displaying a cyberpunk face dominates the right skyline, and trees line the left side of the highway.

events.description: vehicle begins slowing down significantly as it approaches the Hudson street intersection

agents.ego_description: reducing speed while approaching the exit ramp and intersection, following the flow of traffic

entered.detail: large yellow illuminated street sign reading 'Hudson' with directional arrows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the highway while gradually slowing down as it approaches the Hudson intersection. The illuminated yellow Hudson sign becomes visible ahead, while the large cyberpunk billboard recedes into the distance. The street trees pass out of view as the vehicle focuses on the upcoming exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with dense neon advertising and cross traffic

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop and camera begins panning right to view the intersection
perspective shifts from forward highway driving to observing cross-traffic and the illuminated cityscape

agents.ego_description: stopped at the Hudson intersection observing the illuminated cityscape and waiting as futuristic vehicles pass through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large building with prominent blue 'DTR' neon signage and grid-patterned facade
tall building featuring a massive pink holographic display of a woman's face
building-mounted neon sign depicting a green samurai figure with sword

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at the Hudson intersection, and the camera pans right to reveal a dense cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers. The DTR building with its blue signage and a massive pink holographic advertisement tower dominate the view, while futuristic vehicles cross through the intersection. The Hudson sign moves to the left of the frame as the perspective shifts to showcase the vibrant, rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked highway that culminates in a panoramic reveal of a dense, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with a steady glide over wet asphalt reflecting the glow of streetlights and a massive digital billboard of a cyberpunk face, while trees line the left side of the road. As the vehicle gradually slows, the large billboard recedes into the distance and the street trees vanish, giving way to the illuminated yellow Hudson sign appearing ahead. The scene then shifts as the vehicle comes to a halt, with the camera panning right to move the Hudson sign to the edge of the frame. Finally, the perspective opens up to showcase a vibrant cityscape dominated by the blue signage of the DTR building and a towering pink holographic advertisement amidst a flow of futuristic traffic.
